case_title: CAMPBELL, HARRY T. VS BURNS, MICHAEL T., GEN.MGR. PUBLIC TRANSPORTATION- et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAMPBELL, HARRY T. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BURNS, MICHAEL T., GEN.MGR. PUBLIC TRANSPORTATION- SCANLON,BRENDAN G.M.,SF PUBLIC TRANSPORTATION DEPT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO MICHAEL T. BURNS AND BRENDAN SCANLON ARE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
